mapper.sql: select i.*, d.metric_code, d.metric_name from fp_metric_implementation i left join fp_metric_definition d on d.tenant_id = i.tenant_id and d.id = i.metric_definition_id
mapper.select: order by i.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select count(1) from fp_metric_implementation i left join fp_metric_definition d on d.tenant_id = i.tenant_id and d.id = i.metric_definition_id
select count(1) from fp_metric_implementation where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
select count(1) from fp_metric_implementation where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and enabled = true
select count(1) from fp_metric_implementation where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and default_implementation = true
select count(1) from fp_metric_implementation where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and implementation_type in ('SHELL', 'PYTHON')
where i.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and i.metric_definition_id = #{metricDefinitionId} and i.default_implementation = true and i.enabled = true order by i.updated_at desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into fp_metric_implementation (id, tenant_id, metric_definition_id, implementation_code, implementation_name, implementation_type, execution_mode, script_language, script_content, parameter_schema_json, output_schema_json, built_in_collector, default_implementation, system_builtin, enabled, timeout_sec, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{metricDefinitionId}, #{implementationCode}, #{implementationName}, #{implementationType}, #{executionMode}, #{scriptLanguage}, #{scriptContent}, #{parameterSchemaJson}, #{outputSchemaJson}, #{builtInCollector}, #{defaultImplementation}, #{systemBuiltin}, #{enabled}, #{timeoutSec}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update fp_metric_implementation set metric_definition_id = #{metricDefinitionId}, implementation_code = #{implementationCode}, implementation_name = #{implementationName}, implementation_type = #{implementationType}, execution_mode = #{executionMode}, script_language = #{scriptLanguage}, script_content = #{scriptContent}, parameter_schema_json = #{parameterSchemaJson}, output_schema_json = #{outputSchemaJson}, built_in_collector = #{builtInCollector}, default_implementation = #{defaultImplementation}, system_builtin = #{systemBuiltin}, enabled = #{enabled}, timeout_sec = #{timeoutSec}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from fp_metric_implementation where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
